basic_details.job_title: District Collector Office Ranipet Law Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 11 Posts
basic_details.short_information: District Collector Office Ranipet has released an official notification for the recruitment of 11 Law Officer Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline by sending the application form to the official address. The last date to submit the application is 02-07-2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Advocate with not less than seven years of standing at the Bar
qualification.details: Advocate with not less than seven years of practice at the Bar for all posts.

The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. | Download District Collector Office Ranipet Job 2026 Notification PDF

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 02-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 02-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: District Collector Office Ranipet Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Law Officer posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Law Officer posts is 02-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches the office before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies released by District Collector Office Ranipet?
faq.answer: District Collector Office Ranipet has released a total of 11 vacancies for the Law Officer positions. These are distributed across various courts and designations.

faq.question: Q3. What is the required qualification for the Law Officer posts?
faq.answer: To be eligible for these posts, candidates must be an Advocate with not less than seven years of standing at the Bar.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for these vacancies?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Law Officer posts is offline. Candidates need to send their filled application forms to the specified address.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for the Law Officer positions?
faq.answer: The Law Officer positions are on a contractual basis. This means the employment is for a fixed term as per the contract terms.

faq.question: Q7. Which district is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the District Collector Office Ranipet, located in Tamil Nadu.

faq.question: Q8. Are there any age limit relaxations mentioned?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any minimum or maximum age limits, nor does it detail any age relaxation policies. Candidates should refer to the official PDF for precise information.

faq.question: Q9. What are the different posts included under the Law Officer recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment includes various positions such as Additional Public Prosecutor and Additional Government Pleader in different courts, as well as Pleader doing Government Work in District Munsif Courts.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form details can be found in the "Important Links" section of this article, where direct links to the PDF and other relevant resources are provided.
